sources.title: Future of AI in Logistics Market 2026: Market Set to Reach US$ 435.61 Billion by 2033, Led by North America with 38% Share
sources.claim: AI in Logistics Market reached US$ 21.70 billion in 2025; projected US$ 435.61 billion by 2033 at 42% CAGR
sources.notes: Primary market size source. DataM Intelligence report accessed via OpenPR syndication.

sources.title: AI in Warehousing Market Projected to Reach $127.66 Billion by 2035 as E-Commerce Automation and Intelligent Logistics Accelerate Worldwide
sources.claim: Warehouse automation market projected to reach $127.66 billion by 2035
sources.notes: SNS Insider market research report on AI in warehousing specifically.

sources.title: AI Is Already Moving the Logistics Industry Forward
sources.claim: AI implementation delivers 20-30% cost reduction, 25-35% improvement in delivery accuracy; 72% logistics employee AI adoption
sources.notes: BCG 2026 logistics report. High credibility primary consulting source.

sources.title: How Robotics is Driving Warehouse Revenue in 2026 — Physical AI Warehouse Robotics
sources.claim: Symbotic led with 8.7% market share in 2025; top 5 players hold 31.7% combined market share
sources.notes: MarketsandMarkets industry report. Competitor market share data.

sources.title: AI-Equipped Robots Help Logistics Industry Fight Labor Shortages
sources.claim: 78% of facilities report difficulty hiring warehouse staff; 500,000 warehouse jobs unfilled in the U.S.
sources.notes: IFR is the authoritative global source on robotics deployment statistics.

sources.title: 2026 Supply Chain Trends: Problem Solving Labor Shortages, Robotics, and Warehouse Constraints
sources.claim: Order processing volumes have increased 95% since 2019
sources.notes: SPS Commerce industry survey data on warehouse volume trends.

sources.title: Top 12 Warehouse Robotics Companies in 2026: Leaders, Startups, and Competitors
sources.claim: GreyOrange $545M total funding; Geek+ $438M FY2025 revenue; Locus Robotics $180M ARR (June 2026)
sources.notes: Competitor overview with funding and revenue data. Cross-referenced with Sacra and Tracxn.

sources.title: 2026 Logistics IT Trends: AI, Investment & Integration Challenges Accelerate
sources.claim: 85% of executives plan to increase AI spending in logistics in 2026
sources.notes: Inbound Logistics annual industry survey. High practitioner credibility.

sources.title: AI In Warehousing Market Size, Share & Growth Report, 2034
sources.claim: AI in warehousing market projected to grow from $6.34 billion in 2026 to $25.1 billion by 2034 at 17.3% CAGR
sources.notes: Fortune Business Insights primary market research report. Warehousing-specific market sizing.

sources.title: Record Q1, Logistics Push, and AI Partnerships — Amazon News May 2026
sources.claim: Amazon officially launched Amazon Supply Chain Services (ASCS) on May 5, 2026, opening its full logistics network to all businesses
sources.notes: Amazon ASCS launch event documentation. Key industry milestone.

data_quality_notes.growth_5y_note: +380% is estimated from AI in logistics market expanding from ~$4.5B in 2020 to $21.7B in 2025. Exact 2020 baseline varies by report definition. Treat as directional.
data_quality_notes.growth_1y_note: +42% matches the published CAGR and is consistent with Symbotic's 65% growth (highest performer) and the sector average.
data_quality_notes.growth_3m_note: +18% is estimated based on Q1-Q2 2026 deployment momentum (Amazon ASCS, AutoStore CubeVerse, Symbotic expansions). No single authoritative source provides quarterly market data; mark as [estimated].
data_quality_notes.search_volume_note: ~74,000/mo estimated across 'AI logistics,' 'warehouse automation,' 'autonomous mobile robots,' and adjacent terms. Not from Keywords Everywhere — treat as an order-of-magnitude estimate.
data_quality_notes.competitor_revenue_note: Symbotic $2.4B revenue is fiscal 2025 per company investor relations. Geek+ $438M and Locus $180M ARR per Standard Bots aggregation and Sacra.
